html:
Guano is an item dropped by Batilisks similar to Manure, colored grayish-white. It can occasionally be found where Batilisks are commonly found, such as near unplugged Sinkholes and on Stalagmite Terrain.

Guano is 1.5× more effective than Manure when used as a fertilizer, although it cannot be used to craft Farm plots. It creates an aesthetic gas cloud when used as a fuel source.


Trivia

  • In real life, guano is a great fertilizer as well, although the bat variant is the weakest version of guano available.

Guano is an item dropped by Batilisks similar to Manure, colored grayish-white. It can occasionally be found where Batilisks are commonly found, such as near unplugged Sinkholes and on Stalagmite Terrain.
Guano is 1.5× more effective than Manure when used as a fertilizer, although it cannot be used to craft Farm plots. It creates an aesthetic gas cloud when used as a fuel source.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
In real life, guano is a great fertilizer as well, although the bat variant is the weakest version of guano available.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Guano là một vật phẩm rơi ra từ Batilisks tương tự như Phân, có màu trắng xám. Đôi khi nó có thể được tìm thấy ở những nơi thường thấy Dơi Tử Xà, chẳng hạn như gần các Hố sụt chưa được cắm điện và trên Địa hình Thạch Nhũ.

It creates an aesthetic gas cloud when used as a [[Fire#Fuel|fuel source]]. == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * In real life, [[Wikipedia:guano|guano]] is a great fertilizer as well, although the bat variant is the weakest version of guano available. {{Mob Dropped Items}} [[vi:Phân Dơi]] [[Category:Fertilizer]] [[Category:Fuel]] [[Category:Resources]] [[Category:Mob Dropped Items]] [[Category:Flammable Objects]]
